title: Modded to Perfection
description: Over 100 mods to make Minecraft feel like a sequel!
body:
Modded to Perfection adds many mods and resource packs to make Minecraft feel new and like a sequel! Modded to Perfection includes:

VFX+ Resource Pack
Adds many new effects that make Minecraft look great, without shaders!

Dungeons and Taverns, Explorify, and more
Mods/Data Packs that add tons of new structures so you always have something to explore!

New Animations
Fresh Animations, Hold My Items, and Fresh Moves making Minecraft feel more alive!

QoL Mods
Many Mods (ex. Zoomify) to make Minecraft nicer to play!

(WARNING: MODPACK MAY BE BUGGY. JUST SAYIN')
